narrative: US-Iran tensions escalate over the weekend, setting up a risk-off environment for the Tokyo open. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1723; ECB hold removes near-term downside risk but Fed-ECB 175bp differential caps upside. USD/JPY closed Friday at 157.03; any hawkish surprise from the next BoJ meeting would pressure USD/JPY from Friday's close. AUD/USD is likely to extend gains on commodity bid, while USD/CAD may weaken on crude price support.
